ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO JULY 24, 2007. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF FAISAL HABEED'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-07-621703 WITH CASE CGC-07-462076. HEARING HELD. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED; CASE NUMBER 621703 IS DESIGNATED AS THE LEAD CASE. MATTER IS CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. COUNSEL PRESENT "STIPULATION SETTING ASIDE DEFAULTS, CONSOLIDATION OF ACTIONS, SETTING BRIEFING SCHEDULE AND HEARINGS ON MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND REGARDING TRIAL" TO THE COURT. COURT INDICATES TENTATIVELY WHAT IT WOULD ORDER (SET ASIDE DEFAULT, ANSWER WITHIN FIVE DATES, DEFAULT DATE OFF CALENDAR, BRIEFING SCHEDULE (PARAGRAPH 6 IN STIPULATION), PARAGRAPH 7 OF STIPULATION RE DISCOVERY ON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND MAINTAIN RENT AS DISCUSSED IN PARAGRAPH 8 OF STIPULATION). COURT INDICATES THAT IT DOES NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO RULE ON ANY MATTER RELATING TO THE TRIAL DATE. MR. MICHAEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
